Class TimeData

java.lang.Object
Entities.TimeData
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class TimeData extends Object implements Serializable
Represents time-related data for a reservation. Stores the reservation time, actual arrival time, and departure time.
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • TimeData

      public TimeData(LocalTime reservationTime, LocalTime actualArrivalTime, LocalTime departureTime)
      Constructs a new TimeData object with the specified times.
      Parameters:
      reservationTime - the reserved time for the reservation
      actualArrivalTime - the actual arrival time of the customer
      departureTime - the departure time of the customer

    • getReservationTime

      Returns the reserved time for the reservation.

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of the TimeData object. Includes reservation time, actual arrival time, and departure time.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      a string representation of this TimeData
